text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a dance lesson in the lead up<n>to our next
concert...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hmm hm hm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Dance Instructor
text_block_list.text: And turn, and pose!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ta! ♪

text_block_list.name: Dance Instructor
text_block_list.text:
That was outstanding, Bourbon! I<n>could really feel
the emotions coming<n>through.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Is there something on your mind?
Is there something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No, there is nothing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: And there are no "emotions" either.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I sang and danced in order to deliver<n>the
performance instructed of me. Yet,<n>the teacher
said she felt my<n>"emotions" coming through.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: So what, exactly, came through?
choice_data_list: The emotions you put into the lyrics, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I am incapable of that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To infuse lyrics with emotion, one<n>must first
synchronize with the<n>words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, many of the lyrics are<n>indecipherable to
me. As such, I<n>cannot convey anything with them.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am incapable of a performance like<n>what Falcon
gave.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To convey feelings to somebody from<n>the bottom
of my heart is... one<n>mission I have yet to
accomplish.
choice_data_list: I think you do have emotions you want to convey.
I think you do have emotions you want to convey.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Emotions I want to convey?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Preparations complete. Continuing on<n>to today's
stage.

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, Bourbon! You're going on<n>stage today?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Identifying... Match found. You must<n>be the girl
who gave me a fan letter<n>not too long ago.

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, that's me! You remembered?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for coming today.

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I, um... Ah, you have a concert to get<n>to! I-I didn't
mean to keep you!

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I'm really excited to see you<n>perform!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Target has fled. Unable to continue<n>conversation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Failed to communicate message:<n>"Your letter
gave me the energy I<n>needed."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Expressions of feeling are... difficult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our third concert begins!
